chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي مُحَمَّدٍ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 75 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Muhammad<sup>asws </sup>(11th Imam<sup>asws</sup>)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول وقيل ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (389/ 3)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول وقيل ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (389/ 3)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنْ كَانَ كَوْنٌ وَ أَعُوذُ بِاللَّهِ فَإِلَى مَنْ قَالَ عَهْدِي إِلَى الْأَكْبَرِ مِنْ وَلَدَيَّ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad Al Qalanasy, from Ali Bin Al Husayn Bin Amro, from Ali Bin Mahziyar who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘If there was an occurrence (of death), and I seek Refuge with Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, so to whom?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> Covenant is to the eldest of my<sup>asws</sup> sons’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad al-Qalanisi from Ali ibn al-Husayn ibn ‘Amr from Ali ibn Mahziyar who has said the following. “Once I said abu al-Hassan (a.s.), “If something will happen-I seek refuge before Allah – to who then will go (Leadership with Divine Authority)?” He said, “My covenant (directive will) is for the eldest of my sons.”
